title: Teriyaki Roast Beef
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring tender roast beef glazed with a sweet and savory teriyaki sauce.
instructions: Season the roast beef with salt and pepper.
Place the roast beef in a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot.
In a small bowl, whisk together the teriyaki sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, ginger, and garlic. Brush the glaze all over the roast beef.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2-1/2 to 3 hours, or until the roast beef reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the roast beef rest for 10-15 minutes.
Slice the roast beef against the grain and serve with the remaining teriyaki glaze spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds, if desired.
